title: Is Mondelez A Good Dividend Stock?
text: In this article, we assess whether Mondelez is a good dividend stock. The company is one of the largest consumer defensive companies, focused on snacks in developed and emerging markets.

title: Oreo maker Mondelez pulls ads off Twitter, citing hate speech -CEO
text: Mondelez International Inc CEO Dirk Van de Put said in a Reuters Newsmaker interview on Tuesday that the maker of Oreo cookies has pulled its ads off Twitter after Tesla Inc boss Elon Musk acquired the social media site.

title: Sell-Side Interest Drives Mondelez Higher
text: Mondelez International is moving higher with sell-side support and results to drive the market higher. Outperformance is expected in 2023.

title: Cadbury's owner Mondelez lifts 2022 outlook and prices as third-quarter beats forecasts
text: Cadbury's owner Mondelez (NASDAQ:MDLZ) has raised its full-year forecasts and rolled out more price hikes as its third-quarter results beat estimates. The Oreo biscuits maker expects its 2022 organic net revenue to increase by more than 10%, up from a prior estimate for an over 8% jump.

title: Mondelēz International, Inc. (MDLZ) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mondelēz International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDLZ ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 1, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Shep Dunlap - VP, IR Dirk Van de Put - Chairman & CEO Luca Zaramella - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Ken Goldman - JPMorgan Andrew Lazar - Barclays Robert Moskow - Credit Suisse Chris Growe - Stifel Robert Dickerson - Jefferies Pamela Kaufman - Morgan Stanley John Baumgartner - Mizuho Securities Operator Good day, and welcome to the Mondelēz International Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Today's call is scheduled to last about one hour, including remarks by Mondelēz management and the question-and-answer session.

title: Mondelez (MDLZ) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Mondelez (MDLZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.82% and 3.80%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Mondelez stock jumps as snacking demand shows ‘resilience' amid rising prices
text: Shares of Mondelez International Inc. rallied after hours on Tuesday, after the large snack maker raised its sales and profit forecasts and reported third-quarter results that topped expectations, citing a “resilience” in demand following signs of a more anxious consumer as prices rise.

title: OREO THINS and Microsoft 365 Make a Film about Dogs and Office Life. Wait, what?
